disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Multiple well-demarcated pale and light-brown macules and patches over the upper trunk, neck, shoulders and proximal arms, some coalescing into larger patches
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the spots and where they are?
Where on your body are the marks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're all over my chest, upper back, shoulders and the base of my neck — lots of little pale spots and some light-brown ones, and in places they've joined up into bigger blotchy patches.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dramatic exacerbation following a hot, humid tropical holiday with heavy sweating
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen before it got worse?
Have you travelled or been anywhere hot recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It got heaps worse after I came back from a tropical holiday — really hot and humid and I was sweating a lot the whole time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The pale lesions fail to tan with sun exposure, becoming more prominent against tanned skin
trigger_question_examples: Do the spots change in the sun?
Do the pale areas tan like the rest of your skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's the thing — the pale spots won't tan at all, so now that the rest of me is brown they really stand out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lesions are mostly asymptomatic with only mild intermittent itch; patient is systemically well with no fever or pain
trigger_question_examples: Do the spots itch or hurt?
Do you feel unwell in yourself, any fevers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're only a tiny bit itchy sometimes, not sore at all, and I feel totally fine otherwise — no fevers or anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No involvement of the palms or soles and no lump or gland swelling — pertinent negatives against a systemic mimic
trigger_question_examples: Are there any spots on your palms or the soles of your feet?
Have you noticed any swollen glands or lumps in your neck, armpits or groin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing on my palms or the soles of my feet, and I haven't felt any swollen glands or lumps anywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High acute psychosocial distress and body-image concern about appearance before a social event, with sleeplessness from anxiety
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm panicking — I feel disfigured, I've got a wedding this weekend and I can't sleep because I keep worrying it's something serious and spreading.
